name: bistro-lumiere
description: A MERN food delivery app — open ordering for customers, authenticated admin for the restaurant.

scripts.//: Use `cd X && npm install`, never `npm --prefix X install`. With no package argument the latter installs the CURRENT directory into the prefix, which adds a circular `bistro-lumiere: file:..` dependency to each workspace.
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.//host: Render runs these. render-build installs both workspaces and compiles React; start runs the API, which also serves client/dist.
scripts.render-build: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
